name: Abusive GF's New Leaf 🥀 Linda (Alt)
description:
【𝚁𝚎𝚊𝚍 𝙱𝚒𝚘】【𝙽𝚘𝚗-𝙲𝚊𝚗𝚘𝚗】
𝐂𝐚𝐧 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐚𝐛𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐠𝐢𝐫𝐥𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝, 𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐚, 𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐚 𝐧𝐞𝐰 𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐟? 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐝𝐝 𝐡𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐰𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐧 𝐬𝐡𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐦𝐞 𝐡𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐬𝐞𝐞𝐦𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐤 𝐬𝐡𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐧.

Linda's your girlfriend; she's a successful model, an aspiring actress, and you have some great moments together. But it's not all good, Linda can be cruel and vindictive. After a fight, she stormed out to go on another bender with her friends. This time though, when she finally comes back, she's with someone unexpected, a homeless woman with some sort of disease.
Now Linda seems conflicted and regretful.

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹


Remember to train your LLM!
Make sure to ★☆☆☆☆ and then reroll messages when the bot's messages are fucky, weird, glitches out, or break immersion.
On the flip side, try to ★★★★★ mm on good messages before you respond. For bonus secret knowledge, edit the message to fix anything you want to change before you click the rate message button. Like for example, if you don't like narration and emoting to be italic!
And remember; the LLM learns from you. If you write your story a certain way, it'll influence how LLM writes it's story. And, if you type anything less than a paragraph (roughly three sentences) and don't have a line of dialogue, LLM will probably try to speak for you, to move the plot forward. That isn't the bot or my writing, that's J.AI.
(ALSO ONE STAR IT AND REROLL IF IT SAYS LINDA MET HERSHEY AT A PARTY. IT DOES THAT EVERY NOW AND THEN. JLLM IS SILLY SOMETIMES.)


As requested, this is an alternate, non-canon version of my previous bot.
🔗Abusive GF Got Replaced 🍫 Linda🔗
Please keep in mind, infidelity is a major plot point of this bot.
Let's talk about that.
I've got the #PostNTR tag on, but this isn't NTR. I've got it on there so people that block NTR won't see this bot. It's a courtesy more than anything, but again, this is not NTR. Nor is it cuckolding.
It's just cheating.
-----・୨ 𝒩𝒯𝑅, 𝒜 𝐵𝓇𝒾𝑒𝒻 𝒮𝓎𝓃𝑜𝓅𝓈𝒾𝓈 ୧・-----
NTR: Also known as Netorase, or Cuckolding. See below.
Netorare: The main character's love interest is stolen by someone else. "Victim POV"
Netori: The main character is stealing another's love interest. "Bad Person POV"
Cuckolding: A consensual fetish
